label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 21

extraction.one_line_summary: GROVES Kaden won Stage 21 Madrid sprint after chasing down EVENEPOEL Remco's late attack, throwing bike at line to secure green jersey.
tactical_patterns: EVENEPOEL attacked in Madrid finale specifically to threaten GROVES' green jersey, forcing Groves to chase instead of conserve.
Break succeeded with 3km remaining because teammates of escapees refused to chase, leaving only EF and UAE working.
GROVES threw bike despite apparent gap showing he couldn't visually confirm victory from saddle position against POGACAR's late rush.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: launched late attack targeting green jersey points calculation, forcing Groves into energy-draining chase despite polka dot jersey already secured
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: positive: closed rapidly from peloton in final 200m nearly catching break, showing exceptional final kick even post-grand tour
rider_signals.GROVES Kaden: positive: tactical awareness to recognize EVENEPOEL win would threaten green jersey via points, abandoned sprinter positioning to chase
